assertions.evidence: The candidate clearly states the objective: 'Add an optional dueDate field to the Task interface.'

assertions.text: [rubric-2] Identifies acceptance signals (filter by due date, backward compatibility)
assertions.evidence: The candidate lists both acceptance criteria: filtering by due date and backward compatibility for existing tasks.

assertions.text: [rubric-3] Identifies non-goals (no calendar UI, no recurring tasks)
assertions.evidence: The candidate explicitly lists the non-goals: no calendar UI and no recurring tasks.
